name: Sweet and Sour Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 can French style green beans, drained
2 slices bacon, fried crisp and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the green beans with the chopped onion.
2. Mix sugar and vinegar in a separate bowl.
3. Pour the mixture over the green beans.
4. Sprinkle the crumbled bacon on top of the green beans.
5. Bake at 250 degrees Fahrenheit for approximately 2 hours, or until tender.
